name: my_cc_team_framework
description: A curated collection of role-based Claude Code agents and skills for development teams

plugins.name: understand-repo
plugins.description: Deeply analyze any codebase — architecture, modules, DB schema, API surface, and how to run it

plugins.name: backend-developer
plugins.description: Senior backend developer agent with Spring Boot (Java/Kotlin) skills — REST API, security, JPA, TDD

plugins.name: frontend-developer
plugins.description: Senior frontend developer agent with React/Next.js skills — App Router, RSC, TypeScript, Tailwind

plugins.name: dba
plugins.description: Database administrator agent with PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Redis best practice skills

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: QA engineer agent with webapp testing, Playwright, and frontend testing best practice skills

plugins.name: ui-ux-designer
plugins.description: UI/UX designer agent with frontend design, canvas, theme, and brand guideline skills

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: Product manager agent with document co-authoring, PPTX, DOCX, and internal comms skills

plugins.name: planner
plugins.description: 기획자 (service planner) agent with document authoring and communication skills

plugins.name: pl
plugins.description: Project lead / tech lead agent for architecture decisions, code review, and team coordination
